creator: jc@michot.fr
text:
Created attachment 253273
PATCH to add support for EATON / MGE UPS

Patch to support: 

. EATON Ellipse
. UPS MGE UPS Systems

tested with FreeBSD 13.x and 14.1 with:

https://www.amazon.fr/gp/product/B082TGMZGP/ref=ppx_yo_dt_b_asin_title_o00_s00?ie=UTF8&th=1
https://www.amazon.fr/gp/product/B0052Y3ICG/ref=ppx_yo_dt_b_search_asin_title?ie=UTF8&th=1

Regards,
